title: YegsPack
description: Texture pack used by YegsTv, maintained by Ark:)
body:
The YegsTv Texture Pack!

Features;
- Dark Mode EVERYTHING
- Smoother Font
- Blue -> Green Gradient XP Bar
- Black Bow
  - Pullback Indicator
- Modern Paintings
- Visual Durability

other tiny things :)

- Maintained by **[Ark](https://www.twitch.tv/ark_mc)**
- For BEDROCK versions, join the **[Discord](https://discord.gg/DaGqzj67CA)**

**CREDITS**
- VanillaTweaks
- SpectreDount (Diminshing Durability)
